Slot: FINGER
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Vendor Bait
Level to Attain: 10

__DEL__1595780180228
14 posts
Definitely go to cobalt scar for it. I killed everything i saw in loio and swamp of no hope for what seemed like hours and got nothing. I then went to Cobalt Scar, killed the 4 bulthars and got 3 rings in about 3 minutes.

bloodstone ring drop

I also got the bloodstone ring off of a fire-type goblin up on the ridge next to the greater lavaspinners. Never found one on any of the other mobs listed for Lavastorm mountains, and we killed many.

# Feb 11 2008 at 12:49 PM Rating: Decent

17 posts
I tried the skirmishers / battlemasters / brawlers and that marus seru approach for about 3 hours.. then I went to lavastorm and got it in less than 10 minutes on rock dervishes....

This thing is to hard to find for such a low level quest imo...

Bloodstone Ring

# Jan 22 2008 at 10:48 AM Rating: Decent

Bfr just looted Bloodstone Ring off "a rock dervish" in Lavastorm.
▲ Page top
Best place to farm these
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2007 at 1:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592311701237
1 post
To all you iksar cultural armor crafters your search is over !! I have been camping for a bloodstone ring for 3 days now trying places mentioned on this thread with no luck. I then started shouting to buy one for 20k... i know... i was desperate... to my surprise i got a tell saying they dropped rather common in Marus Seru off Stonegrabbers . Sure enough the first stone grabber i killed BAM ! bloodstone ring. second stonegrabber i killed.... bloodstone ring. So if you are like me and cant seem to get this to drop no matter how many goblin battlemasters you kill, give marus seru a try. You'll be glad you did

Vulas Ashenhand 70 monk - Firiona Vie server
▲ Page top
